nodes.name: Basileuterus
nodes.summary: Basileuterus（Basileuterus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Fan-tailed warbler、Rufous-capped warbler、Black-cheeked warbler等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yungas warbler
nodes.summary: Yungas warbler（Basileuterus punctipectus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yungas warbler。

nodes.name: Yungas warbler
nodes.summary: The Yungas warbler (Basileuterus punctipectus) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It was previously considered conspecific with the three-striped warbler. This bird is found in South America from southeastern Peru to southcentral Bolivia. References Gill F, D Donsker & P Rasmussen (Eds). 2022. IOC World Bird List (v12.2). doi : 10.14344/IOC.ML.12.2.
